sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17252" key="a)ttagh=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀττᾰγ-ῆς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n17252.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀτταγήν</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:405" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.405</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:427" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">427</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
